title: Entadopsis nana
taxonomy: Entadopsis nana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. It belongs to the genus Entadopsis, which is a group of tropical to subtropical flowering plants. Further classification places Entadopsis nana within the subfamily Faboideae, a large and diverse group of legume plants. The plant is native to tropical regions and is often found in warm, humid environments. Its classification within the Fabaceae family is due to its characteristic flowers and fruit, which are typical of this group of plants.
